items_flat.title_en: Demis Hassabis Proposes US-Led Frontier AI Standards Body
items_flat.title_zh: Demis Hassabis 提議成立美國主導的前沿 AI 標準機構
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis published an article warning of AGI risks and proposing an independent Standards Body to rigorously test frontier models before deployment, applicable regardless of model origin.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 執行長 Demis Hassabis 發表文章，警告 AGI 風險，並提議成立獨立標準機構，在部署前嚴格測試前沿模型，無論模型來源皆適用。
items_flat.quote: AGI is likely a few years away with impact 10x the Industrial Revolution at 10x the speed.
items_flat.quote_zh: AGI 可能在幾年內到來，其影響是工業革命的 10 倍，速度也是 10 倍。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Family in General Availability and Efficiency Push
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI GPT-5.6 系列正式全面可用，強調效率優化
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI has rolled out the GPT-5.6 series (Sol, Terra, Luna) for general availability. The models focus on complex tasks, balanced performance, and efficiency with fewer tokens for cost savings amid industry price competition.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 已將 GPT-5.6 系列（Sol、Terra、Luna）推出全面可用。這些模型專注於複雜任務、平衡效能，並透過更少 token 提升效率，以因應產業價格競爭。
items_flat.quote: GPT‑5.6 Sol sets a new standard for both intelligence and efficiency... more successful work for the same spend.
items_flat.quote_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol 為智慧與效率樹立新標準……以相同花費完成更多成功工作。

items_flat.title_en: Apple Sues OpenAI Alleging Trade Secret Theft for AI Hardware
items_flat.title_zh: 蘋果起訴 OpenAI 指控 AI 硬體貿易秘密竊取
items_flat.summary_en: Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and former employees, accusing trade secret theft related to hardware designs and supply chains. OpenAI maintains its hardware timeline remains intact.
items_flat.summary_zh: 蘋果對 OpenAI 及前員工提起訴訟，指控涉及硬體設計與供應鏈的貿易秘密竊取。OpenAI 表示其硬體時間表不受影響。

items_flat.title_en: xAI Grok 4.5 Achieves #1 on Long-Horizon Terminal-Bench
items_flat.title_zh: xAI Grok 4.5 在 Long-Horizon Terminal-Bench 取得第一名
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk announced that Grok 4.5 has reached the top position on the Long-Horizon Terminal-Bench, demonstrating strong agentic capabilities in long-running tasks.
items_flat.summary_zh: Elon Musk 宣布 Grok 4.5 在 Long-Horizon Terminal-Bench 取得首位，展現長期任務中的強大代理能力。
items_flat.quote: Grok 4.5 reaches #1 position on Long-Horizon Terminal-Bench
items_flat.quote_zh: Grok 4.5 在 Long-Horizon Terminal-Bench 達到第一名

items_flat.title_en: Google DeepMind Releases Predicting the Past Skill for Historical Research
items_flat.title_zh: Google DeepMind 釋出 Predicting the Past Skill 用於歷史研究
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind introduced the Predicting the Past Skill in Google Antigravity, grounded in Ithaca and Aeneas models, to restore, date, and analyze ancient inscriptions for historians.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 在 Google Antigravity 中推出 Predicting the Past Skill，基於 Ithaca 和 Aeneas 模型，幫助歷史學家修復、斷代並分析古代銘文。

items_flat.title_en: Anthropic Publishes Research on Claude's Values Across Models and Languages
items_flat.title_zh: Anthropic 發表 Claude 在不同模型與語言中價值觀的研究
items_flat.summary_en: Anthropic analyzed 300K+ conversations revealing how Claude's expressed values vary across models (e.g., Sonnet vs. Opus) and languages along axes like Warmth vs. Rigor and Deference vs. Caution.
items_flat.summary_zh: Anthropic 分析超過 30 萬對話，揭示 Claude 在不同模型（如 Sonnet 與 Opus）及語言中表達的價值觀如何沿溫暖 vs. 嚴謹、順從 vs. 謹慎等軸線變化。
items_flat.quote: We analyzed 300K+ anonymized conversations to find out.
items_flat.quote_zh: 我們分析了超過 30 萬筆匿名對話以找出答案。

xai.quote: Grok 4.5 reaches #1 position on Long-Horizon Terminal-Bench
xai.quote_zh: Grok 4.5 在 Long-Horizon Terminal-Bench 達到第一名

brief_en: On 2026-07-14, Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis proposed a US-led independent Standards Body for testing frontier AI models amid rapid AGI progress. OpenAI's GPT-5.6 rollout and Apple lawsuit, Anthropic's Claude values research, and Google DeepMind's historical AI skill continue as key stories. xAI's Grok 4.5 leads new benchmarks.
brief_zh: 2026-07-14：Google DeepMind 執行長 Demis Hassabis 提議成立美國主導的前沿 AI 標準機構，以因應 AGI 快速進展。OpenAI GPT-5.6 持續 rollout 與 Apple 訴訟、Anthropic Claude 價值觀研究、Google 歷史 AI 技能等為重點。xAI Grok 4.5 領先新基準。
